name: Top 12 Google Business Profile Post Schedulers
header_text: Top 12 Google Business Profile Post Schedulers
table_description: Top Google Business Profile Post Schedulers
description:
A strong online business presence needs an up-to-date and well-managed Google Business Profile, but that's not enough.

You must post on your Google Business Profile (formerly Google My Business) consistently to rank higher locally. Post to engage online users and prompt them to take action - visit your website or make a reservation. If you want to schedule posts on your Google Business Profile easily, you have come to the right place.

We have meticulously shortlisted the best Google Business Profile post schedulers. This summary of the software tools' features, costs, and more, will enable you to choose a tool to readily schedule your posts daily.

With the right scheduler, you can dominate local search, attract more customers, and increase your revenue.

What is a Google Business Profile Post Scheduler? 

A Google Business Profile Scheduler is a tool that lets you plan and manage your Google Business Profile updates in advance. This means you can schedule posts, offers, and updates to appear on your business profile at specific times. It’s handy for keeping your profile active and engaging without having to log in constantly. With this tool, you can ensure your business stays visible and up-to-date, saving you time and effort. It’s especially useful for businesses that want to maintain a consistent online presence and make the most of their Google Business Profile.

Benefits of a Google Business Post Scheduler

Using a Google Business Post Scheduler has several benefits. 

  1. It lets you plan and automate your posts, so you can keep your profile updated without having to do it manually every day. This means you can maintain a consistent presence online, even when you're busy. 
  2. Scheduling posts in advance also helps you stay organized and ensures your content goes live at optimal times for engagement. 
  3. Plus, it saves time and effort, letting you focus on other important tasks. 
  4. Overall, it’s a smart way to boost your business’s visibility and keep your audience engaged.

Now that we have that sorted, let’s get started. 

How to choose the best Google Business Profile post scheduler

It is important to select the right tool for your business. Thus, it is advisable to consider the criteria before making your choice.  

1.User-Friendly platform

The platform should be easy to use, enabling your team to readily onboard and schedule posts daily efficiently.    

2. Accurate tool

You cannot afford to pay for incorrect data, inconsistent listings, or other inaccuracies. Your preferred tool must be precise and store accurate data and information.  

3. Scalability for current and future needs

Review the software platform's scalability. Evaluate your current and future needs and get a software solution that can grow with the business.

4. Budget requirements  

Ensure you strike the right balance between available features and cost.

5. White labelling  

Confirm the platform supports white labelling if you are an agency or reseller.

6. Profile analytics and reporting    

Reliable local analytics and reporting are important for measuring success and executing data-driven business decisions.

7. Google reviews management    

Boost your online reputation by choosing a tool that lets you effectively manage customer reviews.

8. Boost local SEO    

Review the tool's features to enhance local SEO, increase online visibility, and “show up where your customers are looking.”

9. Managed Services    

Ensure your tool’s functionality is boosted by the availability of managed services an expert team offers – if you want to use this extra support.

10. Evaluate the level of automation offered by the tool

Make sure the platform's automation (and AI features) meets your minimum requirements:

  1. Content creation: Ensure the tool can accelerate content creation by writing posts, finding and resizing images, animating images, and more.
  2. Advertising: Confirm the tool meets your advertising criteria.
  3. Post recycling and management of evergreen content in pre-determined time slots to increase the lifespan of posts.
  4. Automated scheduling of posts to meet the criteria of timing and consistency.
  5. Platform integration: Reposting from other accounts (if you have business activities on multiple social media accounts).
